name: Smoked Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes in half down the stem side.
2. Remove stems and scoop out all pulp and seeds from each half. Dry inside and out with paper towels.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper into each tomato half.
4. Drain and chop artichoke hearts. Squeeze moisture from chopped spinach.
5. Chop green onions.
6. Combine chopped ingredients with cream cheese, sour cream, oregano, garlic powder, Parmesan cheese, and seasoned mixture in a bowl.
7. Stuff each tomato half heaping full with the filling.
8. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top of each stuffed tomato half.
9. Smoke the tomatoes on a smoker rack at 225 degrees for 30 to 40 minutes, or until cooked to your liking. Do not overcook; they should remain firm but tender.
10. Recommended wood for smoking: Hickory
